text:
2026 Integrated Packer & Cold Storage Report

Reporting Period: March 13, 2026 (Q1 Performance Update)

Breaking Industry News

Packer & Processing News

Packer Margins Turn Positive: In a major reversal from February's record losses, average beef packer margins turned positive this week, reaching +$20.00 per head. This recovery was driven by a sharp rise in the Choice Boxed Beef Cutout to a six-month high of $397.09/cwt.

The "Family Grocery and Farmer Relief Act": Introduced in the Senate on March 5, 2026, this landmark legislation proposes a "Single Protein Mandate." If passed, it would force giants like Tyson and Cargill to divest operations so they only process one species (e.g., only beef OR only pork).

Foreign Ownership Ban: The new bill specifically targets foreign-controlled firms like JBS S.A. and Smithfield Foods, potentially requiring them to sell their U.S. assets to domestic companies within a strict timeframe.

Labor Alert: A potential strike at the JBS Greeley beef plant (Colorado) is currently being monitored, with workers authorizing a walkout that could disrupt 5% of national daily slaughter capacity.
Cold Storage & Inventory News

USDA Inventory Tightening: Total red meat in cold storage has fallen to 863M lbs, down 2% year-over-year.

Beef Storage Floor: Beef stocks fell to 435M lbs (-4% YoY). Boneless beef (grinding material) saw the steepest drop, falling 5% as retailers pull from reserves to maintain ground beef supplies.

Pork Belly Build: Pork bellies in storage surged 16% month-over-month, now sitting 3% higher than last year. This "bacon buffer" is expected to cap retail price spikes through the spring.

The Butter Rally: After a 17% YoY deficit in storage, wholesale butter prices have "gone vertical," rallying from $1.40 to $1.70 per lb in just 30 days.

Sector-Specific Performance Analysis

Beef & Cattle: The Supply Chokehold

The cattle herd is at its smallest since 1951, creating an unprecedented supply floor.

Slaughter Rates: Capacity utilization has dipped to 74.7%, as packers intentionally slow lines to maintain the newfound positive margins.

Carcass Weights: Weights remain record-high at 895 lbs (+27 lbs YoY), a necessary strategy to wring more "total pounds" out of fewer animals.

Import Strategy: The USDA has raised the 2026 import forecast to 5.57 billion lbs to meet the demand for lean processing beef.

Pork & Hogs: The Efficiency Leader
Pork production is currently the industry's primary volume driver.

Production Forecast: 2026 is on track for 28.2 billion lbs (+2.3% YoY).

Inventory: Unlike beef, pork stocks are healthy, with hams (+6%) and butts (+38%) seeing significant builds.

Market Sentiment: Hogs are trading at a "value" discount to cattle, making pork the preferred protein for feature-based retail ads.
Poultry: The Inflation Hedge
Chicken: Broiler production is being adjusted higher to meet "substitution demand" from beef-weary consumers.

Turkey Scarcity: Turkey remains the outlier in poultry; storage is 8% lower than 2025 due to lingering HPAI (Bird Flu) production gaps.

Retail Move: "Dark meat" chicken (thighs/legs) is seeing record velocity in the "Family Pack" segment.

Dairy: The Protein Power Move
Output: Total milk production is forecast at 234.5 billion lbs, driven by record "Milk per Cow" yields despite a shrinking national herd.

Powder Surge: Non-fat dry milk prices have spiked from $1.20 to $1.40 in three weeks, driven by the "Food as Medicine" movement and high demand for dairy-based proteins.

Executive Data Summary
Beef: Stock-Critically Tight, YOY Change-Down 4%, Packer Margin-Positive ($20/hd), Outlook-Bullish (Supply)

text:
DeFi does not lack yield. It lacks risk infrastructure.

The industry has spent years optimizing for returns. Higher APYs. Complex strategies. The assumption: if you can generate yield, capital will follow.

This assumption is breaking down since fancy yield metrics carry risks most don't account for.

Here's how we do due diligence at Clearstar: 
https://t.co/4u1F5O9yr1

Capital at scale behaves differently than capital at the margin. A retail user chasing 50% APY and an institution allocating $10M or more have fundamentally different requirements. The institution needs to answer questions that the APY number cannot address:

What is the maximum drawdown scenario? What is the liquidity profile if we need to exit? Who is on the other side of this?

Most DeFi protocols are not built to answer them. Clearstar exists at this layer. We create the infrastructure that makes yield deployable at institutional scale.

This means:
- Continuous monitoring
- Exposure limits and concentration controls
- Documented risk parameters with clear rationale
- Transparent reporting on what is actually happening on-chain

Yield attracts capital. Risk infrastructure retains it.

The Spring 2026 ACI Concrete Convention had record-breaking attendance, which included industry professionals from over 40 different countries.🌟 The international efforts at each convention reflect ACI’s continued work to increase global participation and disseminate industry knowledge worldwide.

🌎 International activities at the Spring Convention included the ACI International Forum, International Lunch, International Session: "Carbon Conscious Concrete – International Efforts for CO2 Reduction in the Concrete Industry," and the International Speakers Committee Meeting.

🌎 The ACI international team convened with distinguished representatives from three key global regions—Latin America, Western Europe, and Asia Pacific—highlighting the organization’s continued commitment to international collaboration. During these meetings, ACI signed memorandums of understanding (MOUs) with FIB (The International Federation for Structural Concrete), IBRACON (Instituto Brasileiro Do Concreto), and Associação Brasileira de Normas Técnicas (ABNT). This latest collaboration adds to ACI’s expanding portfolio of international relationships, now numbering more than 75 organizations.

🌎 The FRP Composites Student Competition featured 43 teams from around the world, including the USA, Bangladesh, Canada, Mexico, Ecuador, Peru, Poland, Guatemala, Columbia, the Philippines, and Puerto Rico.

🌎 ACI also recognized a distinguished group of Chapters from around the world with Excellent and Outstanding ACI Chapters. Winners included chapters from the USA, India, Mexico, Canada, the Philippines, Singapore, Peru and the Republic of Columbia.

C’est pas un post « regardez ce que j’ai fait. »

C’est un rappel.

Pendant longtemps, j’ai été le gamin timide qui osait pas.

Qui avait beaucoup d’ambition mais qui ne passait pas à l’action.

Et puis j’ai décidé d’arrêter d’attendre.

D’arrêter de regarder les autres réaliser mes rêves.

Le chemin est loin d’être fini.

Mais si je devais retenir un seul truc de ces dernières années :

On sous-estime ce qu’on est capable de construire.

Alors si t’hésites encore, t’es probablement plus prêt que tu crois.

text:
Warren Buffett is widely regarded as one of the greatest investors of all time. Born in 1930 in Omaha, Nebraska, he showed an early interest in business and money, buying his first stocks as a child and developing a mindset that would later define his legacy: patience, discipline, and long-term thinking.

Often called the “Oracle of Omaha,” Buffett built his fortune through value investing—the strategy of identifying undervalued companies and holding them for the long run. Through Berkshire Hathaway, he transformed a struggling textile business into one of the most powerful conglomerates in the world, owning major stakes in companies across multiple industries.

But his journey wasn’t free of challenges.

Early in his career, Buffett faced rejection from top institutions, including being turned down by Harvard Business School. Instead of stopping, he adapted, enrolling at Columbia University where he studied under Benjamin Graham, the father of value investing. That decision would shape his entire philosophy.

He also made mistakes—investments that didn’t perform, opportunities missed, and decisions that tested his principles. But unlike most people, he didn’t chase trends or react emotionally. He stayed consistent with his strategy, even when the market moved against him.

What makes Buffett different isn’t just the billions he accumulated.

It’s how he thinks.

While others panic, he stays rational.
While others chase quick wins, he plays the long game.
While others follow the crowd, he trusts his analysis.

His success is a reminder that you don’t need complexity to win.

You need clarity, patience, and the discipline to stick to your strategy when everyone else loses control.

Because in the end, wealth isn’t built in moments of hype.

It’s built over time, by those who stay consistent when it’s hardest.

text:
Choosing to be faithful, whether in a relationship, to a cause, or to one’s beliefs, is a conscious decision that involves commitment, loyalty, and integrity

In Relationships:
Commitment:
Faithfulness in relationships involves a conscious decision to remain committed to one’s partner and to the vows or promises made.
Loyalty:
It means choosing to prioritize the relationship and not betray the trust placed in you.
Honesty:
Being faithful requires open and honest communication, which builds trust and strengthens the bond between partners.
Respect:
Faithfulness is rooted in respect for your partner, their feelings, and the commitment you share.
Choice:
Ultimately, faithfulness is a choice, and it’s a choice that can be made even when faced with temptation

Who are tested with calamity, hardship, ease, and whatnot!

Who are falsely accused with clearly spoken lies.

Who are calling out to the heavens with their blindly eyes,
Who are surrounded & touched with misguidance.

Who are living in the darkness of this world,
Who are hoping for the light of the next.

Who sacrifices every day, losing something behind,
Who are still by Lord's wishes & laws abiding.

Who are seeking His mercy & guidance,

Who are just for the hereafter dreaming,

text:
Faithful Friday.

Rerouted. Detour ahead.

We all know what it’s like to have an unexpected detour. Something that alters our plans. Something that changes our course of direction. 

Sometimes we’ve worked so hard to be on the path we’re on, certain we’re heading in the right direction. Then in a moment it all changes. 

We could spend a lot of time and energy trying to figure out how to get back on the original path from the detour, or we can have faith that the detour is shifting us to where we’ve been meant to be all along. 

Proverbs 3:5-6
“Trust in the Lord with all your heart; do not depend on your own understanding. Seek his will in all you do, and he will show you which path to take.”

#faithful #friday #detour #path #proverbs

text:
on this side of eternity we will always find pain in some way, rather that is physical or emotional pain it’s always lurking somewhere in this fallen world.
We serve a God ( Jesus Christ ) who allowed His body to be broken for ours to healed, His blood to be shed so that we could be covered and seen as Holy, Blameless and Righteous in His sight .
We have been made new in Christ. 
The old is gone the new has come.
While i am a firm believer in the healing power of Christ Jesus , He is a healer , He heals because He loves . 
As believers we can receive in faith the healing that He paid for up on that cross of Calvary . 
However, as a Christian meaning; “ a little Christ like one”, my faith is in Christ , not in miracles, my faith is in Jesus Christ not a healing. My focus is on Jesus Christ, not a healing . 
While I can walk in faith that i have been healed , my faith is not determined on a healing, on a gift, on a blessing or a sign. 
My faith is in Christ , i desire to be caught up looking at Him for all my life , not looking at pain to the point where I am in a waiting for a healing, I’m not in a waiting, I’m in faith , I’m in love . 
I’m not looking at the pain , I’m looking at the healer. I’m looking at the beauty of Jesus .
My eyes are locked on Him .
Many believers have become so focused on “healing” so fixed on “when they will see their healings” and in that they have missed and forgotten the healer Himself.
I don’t find pain joyful, but I do find joy in Him through painful times. 
May we never look for a healing more than we look for Him . 
May we never seek a blessing more than we seek Him.
May my focus never be what I am going through but may it always be what He went through, may it always be who He is and who He has made me to become in Him.

We are victorious in and through Jesus (Romans 8:37). There isn’t anything He hasn’t already accomplished for you (John 16:33). Healing, health, wealth, deliverance, wholeness was purchased for you at the cross. 

With His final breath, Jesus declared “it is finished”. When He said that, He was declaring an end to the power of sin, death, hell, the grave and everything else (Colossians 2:15). Jesus has accomplished it all, completely. Once and for all. (Hebrews 1:3)

You are victorious in Him and His finished work. Rest in His great and perfect love for you today. That’s where your victory lies, in your identity and understanding who you are in Christ. Your victory isn’t dependent on you doing more but on Him and all that He has done for you. As you receive His love you begin to walk true victory, as a recipient, an heir.

text:
A lot of people say they have a relationship with God… but when you look closely, it’s either inconsistent, surface-level or only active in difficult moments. And the truth is, the type of relationship you build with God will determine the kind of growth you experience. Because you can know about God and still feel distant. You can pray and still lack trust. You can believe in him and still struggle with obedience. A real relationship with God is not one-sided. It’s not just love without discipline or faith without consistency. It is built intentionally, through closeness, trust, obedience, honesty and daily connection.
So don’t just settle for saying “I know God.” Build a relationship that actually changes you. Take a moment and ask yourself... what kind of relationship am I really building?

text:
Some of the villages our partners serve can’t be reached by road.

There’s no electricity. No internet. And very little information that ever makes it out.
To reach them, local leaders hike for days—climbing over mountain passes, crossing sheer cliff faces, and descending into valleys where the gospel has never been heard.
These photos capture just one part of that journey.

What they don’t show is the prayer, the preparation, and the quiet courage it takes to go anyway.

This is what it takes to bring the good news to the unreached.

And this is why partnership matters.
As we close out the year, your generosity helps equip leaders who are willing to walk the long way—so that even the most remote places are not forgotten.

Visit our link in bio to learn more.

text:
As I prepare for my retreat I realized I’ve been sharing devotions for almost two years now…studying the Word, breaking it down, and pouring out what I’ve been learning as faithfully as I can. I know how to handle the “talk” part of this journey, the teaching, the explaining, the putting language to revelation.

But recently, there’s been a deeper pull… not just to share what I’m learning, but to be real about what I’m living. Because this walk honeyyyy child…It’s not always as it looks. It’s not always strong. And the warfare that comes with carrying purpose is something I can’t fake. It’s mental battles, spiritual resistance, moments where even obedience feels heavy…but still required.

So I’m learning to share both: the devotion and the discipline it takes to stay standing in it. God is still faithful in the middle of all of it.
 
Hoping these inner thoughts and the way God meets them remind you that He is always there, even in the quiet, even in the chaos, even in the moments you don’t have words for what you’re feeling.
#spiritualwalktalk #faithful

text:
4 + 8 = WELL DONE!!

We have 4 sons and now 8 diplomas between them. God has been faithful every step of the way, guiding them through high school and college. This is the kind of moment you don’t take for granted—it’s grace, consistency, and commitment all wrapped together.

Not everyone gets to see this kind of fruit. It takes staying the course, honoring the responsibility, and trusting God through every season.

I’ve got to take a moment and thank my incredible wife—she’s been the backbone of this entire journey. Her strength, love, and consistency helped make this moment possible.

My sons have shifted the trajectory of what it means to be a Montgomery, and I’m forever grateful—to God, to my wife, and to them.

text:
Saint Francis de Sales was trained in law to follow his father into public office, but after earning his doctorate he chose the priesthood instead. Though his father strongly opposed the decision, Francis’s patience and gentleness eventually won consent. Ordained and later named provost of Geneva, he evangelized Calvinist regions—especially Chablais—through preaching and clear, written pamphlets explaining Catholic teaching.

At 35 he became bishop of Geneva, serving with tireless charity as preacher, confessor, and teacher. Known for his gentleness—“a spoonful of honey attracts more flies than a barrelful of vinegar”—he wrote Introduction to the Devout Life and A Treatise on the Love of God, emphasizing that holiness is for laypeople in every state of life. For his writings he is patron of the Catholic Press. With Jane Frances de Chantal, he founded the Sisters of the Visitation, dedicated to humility, charity, and love of God.

 #CatholicMen #catholicsaints #faithful #faith

Aby poznać, jak wielki jest Bóg, musisz wiedzieć, jak mały jesteś sam. Możesz czuć się nic nieznaczący, ale Bóg w tobie jest bardzo znaczący. Mało znaczy wiele, gdy oddajesz to w ręce Boga

Każdy nikczemny plan przeciwko twojemu życiu zawiedzie. Kiedy Bóg cię błogosławi, będziesz miał pomnożenie. Im więcej ludzi cię dotyka, tym bardziej Bóg sprawi, że się rozmnożysz.

To, co Bóg w tobie umieścił, nie może zostać powstrzymane przez żadną zewnętrzną siłę. Bóg dał ci zdolność do rozmnażania się od wewnątrz, a nie od zewnątrz do wewnątrz. Twoje błogosławieństwo nie jest „na zewnątrz”. Wszystko, czego Bóg potrzebuje do cudu, jest już w tobie!

Bracia ia Józefa wzięli płaszcz, który dał mu ojciec, żona Potifara wzięła płaszcz, gdy oskarżyła go o gwałt, ale potem faraon obdarzył go płaszczem, przysługą, której nigdy nie będzie mógł odebrać. Ludzie mogą zabrać ci płaszcz z wierzchu, ale nie mogą odebrać Boga, który ci go dał! Bóg jest twoim źródłem. Bóg wynagrodzi ci podwójnie za twój trud, jeśli będziesz wytrwały!

“Be like the moon and show up no matter what phase you’re in.”—Becky Hemsley. 🌙 🌖 🌑🌔
⠀
⠀
Just as the moon quietly marks the passing of time, we are reminded that Jehovah’s timing is steady and purposeful—even when we are still waiting for future blessings. 🌕

At times, what’s happening isn’t always visible. But just as the moon shifts through its phases night after night, Jehovah’s purpose is still moving forward—sometimes so subtly that we may overlook it unless we take the time to notice. 🌝

The moon follows its appointed course with quiet faithfulness, never missing its time (Ps. 89:37). In the same way, Jehovah is completely faithful and dependable. His promises are not delayed, and we can trust that they are being fulfilled exactly as he has purposed, in his time (Hab. 2:3). 🌙✨

This reminds us that we too can keep showing up like the moon—remaining faithful in whatever “phase” we find ourselves in—quietly dependable in even the smallest ways. Jehovah sees that kind of faithfulness and patiently rewards it (Prov. 28:20; Isa. 30:18). 🤍

Not to impress you.
But to draw you close.

Not to overwhelm you.

Personal relationship with Christ over religion.
Resting in His presence over performance.

text:
adidas Originals’ın Ankara’daki İlk Mağazası ANKAmall’da Açıldı

Moda tarihine damga vuran ikonik adidas siluetlerini günümüz stil kodlarıyla yeniden yorumlayan ve yaşam tarzı trendlerine yön veren adidas Originals, Türkiye’deki ikinci, Ankara’daki ilk mağazasını 7 Şubat Cumartesi günü ANKAmall Alışveriş Merkezi’nde açtı.

adidas Türkiye’nin Ankara’daki ilk adidas Originals konseptli mağazası, AVM’nin ikinci katında yer alıyor. Marketspor iş birliğiyle hayata geçirilen mağaza, 140 m² net satış alanına sahip. Markanın yeni nesil perakende yaklaşımını yansıtan modern ve yalın mimarisiyle dikkat çeken mağaza, adidas Originals dünyasını başkentle buluşturuyor.

adidas Originals Ankara ANKAmall, Originals ve lifestyle ürünlerin en yeni koleksiyonları moda ve spor tutkunlarıyla buluşturmanın ötesinde; stil, kültür ve ilhamın kesiştiği bir yaşam alanı olarak konumlanıyor. Mağaza, haftanın her günü 10.00–22.00 saatleri arasında ziyaret edilebiliyor.

Açılışla ilgili değerlendirmede bulunan adidas Türkiye CEO’su Hakan Atalay, şunları söyledi: “adidas Originals, adidas arşivlerinden gelen güçlü mirası, bugünün gençlik kültürü ve yaratıcılığıyla buluşturan çok özel bir marka. İstanbul Teşvikiye’de açtığımız ilk konsept mağazamızın ardından, Türkiye’deki ikinci, Ankara’daki ilk konsept mağazamız olan adidas Originals Ankara ANKAmall ile başkentlilere stil ve kültür odağında ilham veren ayrıcalıklı bir deneyim sunmaktan gurur duyuyoruz.”

text:
How is 2026 NEXT WEEK? 🍾🥂⏳

While I am sick to know how fast time is going, all it’s doing is making me want to be the best version of myself. 

And that starts by revamping my routines & finding the cracks. If you’re looking for a way to reset before the New Year and set yourself up for a successful year, I shared my non-negotiable for starting off on a good foot👀. 

The TLDR;
— do a year in review (aka a life audit). Where did you thrive and where did you fall off?
— host a little mood board / vision board get together with your friends or family. 
— Purge your closet and donate or sell anything you’re not wearing.
— Make a no-spend list. Figure out what you spent the most on last year and if it wasn’t a necessity, make a point to either buy less or none of it at all. 

Let’s make this year one of the best ones yet 🩰. What are you looking forward to in 2026?

#endofyearreflection #newyearresolutions #lifestyleblog #lifestylechange #lifeorganization
label: Lifestyle Daily

text: Hello!!! I have a question for you.  What color are your dreams?? Have they become grayed, muted and dull? Or are they alive and vibrantly colored and being put into action in your life ? Most of you know me as Lulu Schwall, the artist, but I have so many more facets to me like we all do.  I have recently experienced a “reawakening” if you will of dreams/interests I have left by the roadside.  I am excited to pick these back up and explore them again ...namely, fashion, beauty, photography/styling, cooking, relationships and of course art!!! I so love all of these areas and I am thankful that I don’t have to do just one!!! Life is too short to set limits on your creativity or passions!! I also found out there is a name for incorporating all of these areas into one space ...a “Lifestyle Blog”. I’m excited to share my take on all of these areas with you and have a lot of fun doing it.  I’m not at my ideal weight, or ideal place in my life ... my life is not perfect and I don’t wish to show perfection in this blog...I’m committed to showing up in my life and I’m going to celebrate me where I am today ....this blog serves as an avenue for me to do just that!! It’s so silly to wait until we are ready... we will never be truly ready.  I’m diving in with both feet. Dream On! 🌈💫⭐️ #lifestylebloggers #lifestyleblog #dreamon #pickupyourdreams #liveyourpassions #jumpinwithbothfeet #perfectionisoverrated

text:
#Repost @girl_rollin_about_town
• • • • • •
The Langham, London

The idea of creating a lifestyle blog came to me a few years ago. However, instead of immediately getting the creative juices flowing, I waited. Why? Mostly not knowing where to start, the fear of failing and overthinking the process too much! I’m also somewhat of a crazy perfectionist. I decided to start small with a travel blog on Wordpress as I wanted to be able to execute this lifestyle blog to the best of my ability. I am still in the process of fully visualising the idea using Insta as a platform with the intention to launch a website.

My goal is to use the blog as a platform to connect with fellow wheelchair users from around the world and showcase REALNESS!

WHY? Because I don’t feel wheelchair users are showcased or celebrated enough. I also want to address real issues that those with limited mobility may face. I often get told ‘𝑦𝑜𝑢’𝑟𝑒 𝑖𝑛 𝑎 𝑤ℎ𝑒𝑒𝑙𝑐ℎ𝑎𝑖𝑟 𝑦𝑒𝑡 𝑦𝑜𝑢 𝑙𝑜𝑜𝑘 𝑠𝑜 𝑔𝑜𝑜𝑑’ as if trying to say that being in a wheelchair and in good shape or fashionable don’t go hand in hand.

Overall, I’m an entrepreneur in the making who loves the idea of getting creative with blogging, fashion and fitness! Oh, and I very much enjoy gin, champagne, reading & eating. See you all soon on the blog :-) 📸: @sam_walia1611

text:
What is a Lifestyle about?

A lifestyle blog/social media can focus on your life, beauty tips, recipes, or travel. It is about things how you live and see the world. It can be very personal, or you can write about topics that interest you. Here are a few ideas you can start your lifestyle blog/social media:

1. My favorite recipe
2 . My morning routine
3. My evening routine
4. How to sleep better
5. Share the things that inspire you every day
6. Book Review
7. Photo of the day, selfie or other
8. What hair products do I use and why
9. What skin care products do I use and why
10. 5 favorite tourist destinations
11. How to make more time for family
12. 5-minute makeup routine
13. 10-minute makeup routine
14. How to eat healthy
15. Favorite clothing stores
16. Your style (you can publish several publications on the topic)
17. How do I maintain my fitness
18. Contests. These are always popular.
19. Tell us your 2-year plan
20. Relationship advice
21. Favorite smoothie recipe
22. How to save money every month
23. Being single
24. Our family life with children
25. Everyday life of a single parent

There are many other topics you can write about and what I've seen lifestyle bloggers write about. Hopefully, these are useful. 
Please share your lifestyle blog in the comments!

Follow my life at @teijas75

text:
#關於Morning_Routine﻿
#早晨計畫表﻿
﻿
帥寶最近起床都會發懶⋯⋯﻿
一早起床邊聽DWE wake-up songs，﻿
一邊躺在床上悠哉享受，整個忘記接下來要做什麼事情！﻿
﻿
爸媽喊破喉嚨，男寶一樣耳背😂﻿
不然就是說：「再一分鐘好不好？」﻿
雖然通常帥寶都能說到做到，但每天這樣拖拉也是困擾😌﻿
﻿
再來孩子也大了要漸漸學會自己做，而不是爸媽都做好好。﻿
爸媽做好其實是最節省時間的，不用等待孩子、省去孩子犯錯還要再做一次麻煩，因為怕麻煩想省事，會不會也讓孩子錯過學習長大的機會？﻿
﻿
要解決這樣的情況～和隊友討論了一下，與其這樣一直嘮叨不停耳提面命提醒，孩子煩大人心情也不好！﻿
會不會也讓孩子養成叫一句才會動作的習慣，這樣也不好。﻿
﻿
既然 #自動自發 是我們想要的結果那就想一點辦法吧！﻿
就想到可以用 #早晨計畫表 #Morning_Routine 來提醒帥寶每天起床到出門上學前，要做的所有事情！﻿
﻿
其實就是把我們平時熟悉的工作排程表模式教會給孩子。﻿
﻿
和帥寶一起制定的 #Morning_Routine 就貼在冰箱上，我用簡單的插圖讓帥寶一看就懂代表什麼任務：﻿
✔️起床﻿
✔️喝一杯溫水﻿
✔️摺棉被﻿
✔️刷牙﻿
✔️幫花仙子澆水（後面補充花仙子故事）﻿
✔️換衣服﻿
✔️整理書包﻿
✔️吃早餐﻿
﻿
也在每個任務的格子裡放上數字，數字代表者順序，帥寶的年紀已經知道數字順序了，運用在這也讓他更清楚步驟是什麼。﻿
每完成一個任務就在上面蓋印章，帥寶很愛蓋印章，讓他覺得有趣，完成任務給自己一個印章，也讓孩子有成就感😃﻿
﻿
形式可以很活潑，很可愛，孩子就會很樂意參與進去，看看每天早晨到底要做什麼？什麼時候做？﻿
久而久之，就會養成自己的「早晨習慣」，最終讓「習慣」成「自然」了。﻿
﻿
有研究人員發現，每個人養成一個習慣平均要花66天的時間，也就是從一個陌生的動作到能成為自然反應或是反射動作的時間。﻿
﻿
05/12執行到今天第三天，帥寶有小小進步，已經很清楚知道等等的流程，完成每項任務後離出門上學，都還有更多寬裕的時間可以做他自己想做的事。﻿
上學不用匆匆忙忙，心情也比較好、情緒也會比較穩定！﻿
﻿
加油加油💪繼續保持下去﻿
﻿
之後習慣養成了，即使不用這樣的表，也可以慢慢學會安排、管理好早上的時間，精神飽滿、開開心心地開始一天的學習和玩樂了。﻿
﻿
男寶就是每天在鬥志，越有主見想法的孩子，盡量避免硬碰硬的方式，用些方法孩子也能做得很好👍﻿
﻿
男寶媽真的不容易😂﻿
﻿
#倆寶日常 #帥寶3Y10M7D﻿
#Morning_Routine ﻿
#LittleRegan帥寶寶即時播報﻿
﻿
⭐️如何製作Morning Routine﻿
1.用word編輯，格式隨個人喜好。﻿
2.設計好列印A4大小，然後記得護貝。﻿
3.準備孩子喜歡的印章或是磁鐵，完成的任務就在格子裡蓋章或貼上磁鐵，淘寶有賣打勾勾磁鐵，也可以參考唷！﻿
﻿
4.也可加上星期幾的欄位，還有是上學日還是放假日，這都可以變換的唷！﻿
﻿
PS:我用列點式計畫表，護貝後可以每天重複利用同一張Morning Routine就可以了，不用打勾完就丟一張紙，地球也是需要我們好好愛護的！♥️﻿
﻿
💐關於花仙子：﻿
之前還沒有Morning Routine時，跟隊友想解決早上帥寶不知道接下來自己要做什麼的狀況，看到一篇文章有講到可以讓孩子有任務，必須他每天去完成✅﻿
就發想～對也！浴室剛好有一盆植物，就讓帥寶每天幫它澆水！﻿
﻿
這盆植物我們取名它叫花仙子，前一晚鍾爸爸在親子共讀的時間，用講故事聊天的方式讓帥寶得知這個任務，故事內容大概是花仙子想長大所以要喝水，他好想帥寶幫他澆水，他才能像你長的一樣高！（爸爸的故事有起承轉合太長了，就不打上來了😂）﻿
﻿
有時不小心發懶，提醒他說花仙子一整晚沒喝水嘴巴好渴他在等你了！通常都會立馬去做！﻿
﻿
這樣有個明確目標讓他除了有責任心外，也能用有趣的方式讓他有動力。♥️

text:
🚨 Alisha Lehmann shared her morning routine in interviews:

"I wake up at around 8:45 am on training days."

"On days off, I can stay in bed until 1 pm or later. I’m probably the person who sleeps the most — I need my hours and I take a nap every single day."

"I usually wake up with a smile, though I might be a bit groggy the first hour. When I arrive at training, I try to make everyone laugh and bring positive energy to the group."

"No fancy skincare or ice-on-face ritual for me. As a pro footballer, I focus on hydration and fueling my body right."

"For breakfast, it’s often my biggest meal of the day — something simple like rice with meat and beans, pasta with tomato sauce, or a cheeky Swiss classic like Toblerone. I love a creamy spaghetti carbonara as a cheat meal."

"In the morning I love to move: on training days it’s team sessions with strength work (squats, lunges, deadlifts, core), agility, running, and ball skills like keepy-uppies."

"On off days or vacation I do fun stuff like keepy-uppies on the beach, shuttle runs in the sand, or a refreshing dip in the sea (like in Dubai)."

"Starting the day with hard work, gratitude, and good humor keeps me motivated. People don’t always see the effort behind it."

text:
You spend 3 hours on shopify on the same 7 tasks.

I automated all of them with Claude. 👇

Every D2C operator I know has the same morning routine:
→ Open Shopify, check yesterday's revenue
→ Open Ads Manager, check which ads are dying
→ Open Gorgias, triage overnight tickets
→ Check reviews
→ Check stock levels
→ Check competitors
→ Try to actually start the day by 11 AM

3 hours. Every morning. Before any real work happens.

Claude scheduled tasks kill this routine.

Here are the 7 I automated:

1/ Revenue + margin snapshot — daily, 7 AM
Pulls yesterday's orders, AOV, refund rate, net revenue.
Compares to 7-day average. Flags anything off by 20%+.
I know the health of the business before I open Shopify.

2/ Out-of-stock × active ads alert — every 4 hours
Cross-references OOS SKUs with running Meta ad sets.
If an ad is driving traffic to a sold-out product, it flags immediately.
This one task has saved me $1,400+ in wasted spend.

3/ Creative fatigue scan — daily, 8 AM
Tags every active ad: healthy, warning, or critical.
CTR decay, frequency creep, hook rate drops.
I know what to pause before I open Ads Manager.

4/ Review + ticket pattern detector — daily, 8 AM
Scans overnight reviews + Gorgias tickets.
Flags when 3+ customers complain about the same issue.
Catches product problems 2 weeks earlier than manual review.

5/ Competitor ad + content watch — daily, 7 AM
Top 3 competitors' new Meta ads + new TikToks/Reels.
New hooks, formats, angles, sounds.
I see their moves before they scale.

6/ PDP conversion drop alert — daily, 9 AM
Finds products with yesterday's traffic but a conversion rate
20%+ below the site average.
That's a PDP problem, not a traffic problem.
Fixable today instead of next month.

7/ Customer feedback → new ad angles — weekly, Monday
Takes the week's reviews + ticket themes + DM questions.
Generates 5 new ad angles based on actual customer language.
My best ads always come from customer words. Now it's automated.

What this replaces:
Before: 3 hours every morning reading 7 dashboards.
After: 15 minutes reviewing one consolidated brief from Claude.
The rest of the morning is actually mine again.

→ The 7 scheduled task prompts (copy-paste ready)
→ A setup guide for connecting Shopify + Meta
→ A morning briefing template

text:
The Tolerance Sequence

Four things. Done before you touch your phone. Before coffee. Before words from anyone else.

This is not a morning routine. I do not care about cold showers or gratitude lists. This is a narrow intervention that targets the morning window before it closes.

First, lie completely still for about a minute. Then say one identity claim out loud. One sentence. Who you are becoming, stated as fact.

Not “I want to be someone who executes consistently.” That is a wish.

“I am someone who executes consistently.” That is a statement.

Right after, write one sentence. The exact objection your brain threw at the claim.

“You said you’re consistent but you skipped three days last week.”

“You’re not there yet. Why are you lying to yourself.”

Write it on whatever is closest. Notebook. Scrap of paper. Nightstand.

Then do one tiny physical action. Under two minutes. Something that matches the claim.

If your claim is “I am someone who executes consistently,” open the laptop and type one sentence. Close it. Walk away.

Finally, wait. Ten more minutes before you check anything. No notifications. No revenue dashboard.

That extra delay lets the claim settle a little longer before the outside world starts arguing with it.

Phased manufacturing is not the only playbook we can have.

Mind you, I’ve been a content creator since 2011 and it never once crossed my mind to fake film myself waking up for a video. I know content creation is already somewhat performative, but there has to be a line somewhere.

After studying many launches, I've come to realise that what many product launches lack is the right launch plan or strategy!

There's this too much focus on creating viral content for launches, running ads and hiring influencers...

I'm not saying this is bad, however, there are other things that are more relevant to your product launch than all of those.

And that's why you can spend the whole time and resources creating content, running ads or even hire influencers to push your product launch and still have a failed launch. 

It is what it is. 

This is why I always tell founders who come to me to sit down, keep an open mind, and do the work before your launch. 

Because more eyes of your product doesn't automatically equal sales.

text:
3 Tips to Nail Your Product Launch 🪄✨

(You’ll want to save this one for later)

1️⃣ Plan Your Photography Early (2-3 Months Ahead)
Start building your content bank before launch day so you can create buzz early. Last-minute planning can leave you stuck waiting for availability, throwing off your entire launch timeline. 

For the most stress free option, lock in your shoot early and avoid those extra grey hairs.

2️⃣ Set Your Goals
This is when it’s best to jump on a discovery call and have a quick chat about your ideal goals for your launch. My experience here comes in handy if you’re looking for honest recommedations for your brand. 

If your products are ready to go, consider investing in a big shoot upfront to cover all your launch needs at once. This is where we’ll run through a customised proposal to include everything you need for your launch:

- Ecomm
- Creative Product Photography
- Stock Images
- Model Campaigns
- Video

Keep your audience engaged with a variety of content, think studio shots, lifestyle setups, hero images, and flat lays. Repeating the same teaser pics can make shoppers scroll past, diversify to stay fresh and exciting.

3️⃣ Budget Strategy
It all comes down to budget and how hard you want to launch. Go big or go home right? 

Launches can be kind of like planning a wedding. Stay focused on what matters, like ensuring your website is polished and your countdown timers are set. And of course, hire an amazing product photographer 😉 to handle the visuals while you run the show. 

.
.
.
.

text:
🔥Product Launch: OAK HT4 Brake Lever for Hope Tech 4 brakes🔥

The OAK HT4 takes an already outstanding brake to the next level:

The Hope Tech 4 is known for its great build quality, spare parts availability, and reliability—but it has one weak point: the rider interface, a.k.a. the brake lever blade. The design, more aligned with moto-style or two-finger braking, didn’t convince us and led us to develop a tuning brake lever for this exceptional brake.

In true OAK fashion, our design delivers an exceptionally strong, stiff, and ergonomic lever.

Better Ergonomics & Grip Face Technology:

Thanks to the ergonomically optimized finger contact surface combined with OAK’s proven Grip Face Technology (GFT), your finger sits securely at the end of the lever at all times. No sharp edges, no distractions—just full control, even in wet conditions. The upgrade to finally unlock the full potential of the Hope Tech 4. You’re going to love it.

Optimized Adjustability – Full Compatibility:

We’ve refined the adjustment range of the braking system in a meaningful way while maintaining full compatibility with widely available spare parts. An upgrade without limitations.

Enhanced Modulation & Braking Power:

With an optimized lever motion and increased mechanical leverage, you get more braking power and finer modulation with the same finger force. Perfect for technical trails and demanding conditions.

As Individual as You Are:

At OAK, every brake lever is developed individually for its brake system. Years of experience in ergonomics and brake tuning have led to a systematic approach to identifying improvements. That’s why each lever is individually tailored to its system. The distinctive OAK three-pocket design provides the backbone for a lever that is strong, precise, and visually striking.

text:
This $100K delay decision nearly killed our product launch. Instead, it saved us millions and taught me the hardest lesson about enterprise software.

Picture this: 6 months into development, $500K invested, launch date set. Then our enterprise pilot client drops the bomb - our infrastructure won't scale past 1,000 users.

We had two choices:
1. Launch anyway and hope for the best
2. Delay 4 months and rebuild properly

The delay cost us $100K in additional development, pushed back revenue by a quarter, and nearly broke our team's morale.

But here's what happened next:

Month 1 post-launch: We onboarded 5,000 users without a single crash
Month 3: Landed our first $50K enterprise contract because of our "bulletproof infrastructure"
Year 1: Generated $2.3M in revenue, with 73% coming from enterprise clients who specifically chose us for reliability

That $100K delay became our biggest competitive advantage.

Every competitor who rushed to market hit the same scaling wall. They're still rebuilding while dealing with angry customers.

Meanwhile, we're the "enterprise-grade" solution everyone trusts with their critical workflows.

The lesson? In enterprise software, your infrastructure IS your product. Cutting corners on the foundation means cutting corners on your entire business model.

Sometimes the most expensive decision upfront saves you millions in lost opportunities, customer churn, and reputation damage.

Are you facing a similar decision in your business? What's holding you back from making the hard choice that positions you for long-term success?

Drop a comment or DM me - I'd love to hear your story and share what we learned about making these tough calls.

#Enterprisesoftware #ProductLaunch #TechLeadership #SaaS #ProductManagement #TechStrategy #BusinessDecisions #ProductDevelopment #TechFounder #ScalingTech #EnterpriseGrade #TechInfrastructure #ProductStrategy #BusinessGrowth #TechEntrepreneur

text:
🚀 Your product launch shouldn’t be a surprise, it should feel like an event.
If you want people excited on launch day, you need to build hype before the drop.

Here’s how smart brands do it 👇
1️⃣ Tease early - BTS clips, hints, countdowns.
2️⃣ Create FOMO - limited access, sneak peeks, early drops.
3️⃣ Tell your story - show why the product exists.
4️⃣ Involve your audience - polls, guesses, votes, shares.

When you do this right, people won’t “discover” your product at launch…
they’ll be waiting for it. 🔥

💬 Comment “LAUNCH MODE ON” if you’ve got something cooking!

6️⃣ Plan your marketing strategy before launch.
7️⃣ Launch & promote across the right channels.
8️⃣ Listen, adapt, scale.

text:
Accelerating Product Launch with 2-Week Prototypes

Speed matters in startups—but clarity matters even more.

Two-week prototypes help teams move fast without committing too early. Instead of spending months building assumptions, startups can translate ideas into tangible, testable products in just days.

The real value of a 2-week prototype isn’t the code.
It’s the early signal it creates.

Founders gain confidence in direction, not guesses.
Business teams get visual proof, not slide decks.
Product and engineering teams align around what actually works, not opinions.

By prototyping early, teams uncover user behavior, friction points, and feasibility before scaling effort or cost. This reduces rework, shortens feedback loops, and keeps momentum high when it matters most.

Two-week prototypes also bridge the gap between non-technical vision and technical execution. Decisions become faster because everyone is reacting to something real—not abstractions.

When done right, rapid prototypes:

shorten time-to-market
reduce launch risk
improve investor and stakeholder conversations
create smoother handoff into full development

At Sidlabs Online LLP, we use 2-week prototypes to help startups move from idea to launch with speed, structure, and confidence—so teams don’t just launch faster, they launch smarter.

Because in early-stage products, learning fast is the real acceleration.

text:
Before you hit publish on your next online offer or digital launch, ask yourself one question:
Would my ideal client immediately recognize this as made for them?

Most creators focus on the wrong things during a product launch. the price, the design, or making the copy sound perfect.

But in reality, potential clients decide in just a few seconds if an offer is relevant to them 

If your launch strategy isn’t clear about who the offer is for and what problem it solves, people will simply scroll past.

Clarity will always convert better than cleverness.

If you’re planning your next online program launch, course launch, or digital product launch, start here: make sure the right people can instantly see themselves in your offer.

text:
🚀 Got a product launch coming up? Don’t wait until launch day to start marketing! Here are some proven pre-launch marketing strategies to build buzz and excitement for your product ahead of time:

1️⃣ Create a “Coming Soon” Landing Page – Collect email addresses so you can notify people when you go live. Offer a small freebie or exclusive content to make signing up irresistible!

2️⃣ Share Behind-the-Scenes Content – Give your followers a sneak peek of your product and the creation process. Stories, reels, and live videos are perfect for this—they build trust and generate curiosity!

3️⃣ Run a Giveaway – Offer a chance to win your product when it launches. Not only does this create excitement, but it also grows your audience as followers share the giveaway with their friends.

4️⃣ Collaborate with Influencers or Partners – Find others in your niche to help spread the word. This expands your reach to a whole new audience interested in your product.

5️⃣ Tease Your Audience with Countdown Posts – A countdown builds anticipation and reminds your audience to mark their calendars. Use graphics, countdown timers, and launch day reminders.

These strategies are just the beginning! If you want to dive deeper into launching and marketing your product effectively, check out the DWA Digital Marketing Course in my Beacons.ai store. It has everything you need to reach the right audience and maximize your sales. 🌟

Follow me for more tips on making money online and growing your digital business!

text:
🎬 A product launch is more than a release—it’s a performance!

Just like a grand finale in a movie, a well-executed product launch builds anticipation, creates excitement, and leaves a lasting impression. The most successful brands don’t just drop a product—they tell a story leading up to it. From teasers to the big reveal, every launch should feel like an event. 🚀

Think of Apple keynotes, Supreme drops, or Marvel trailers. They don’t just inform; they captivate. A strategic launch builds buzz, drives engagement, and turns a simple product release into a cultural moment. Your product deserves a launch that people remember.

🎭 Follow the three-act structure – Tease, build up, and deliver a powerful launch.
🎟 Make the reveal an event – Create a moment people anticipate and talk about.
🔥 Controlled leaks drive hype – A little mystery gets people excited.
🌍 A launch should feel cultural – Big releases spark conversations, not just sales.
♾ The story doesn’t end at launch – Keep engagement going post-release.

The stage is set—now let’s make your launch a moment to remember. Get in touch and let’s create magic!

text:
🚗 A product launch for over 180 journalists during two weeks?

🆕 @mitsubishimotorsofficial Europe wanted to create an exclusive and singular experience for press media to get to know its brand new flagship model New #OutlanderPHEV.

What did we do?

🇵🇹 We brought together the 180 invited journalists from over 13 different countries in Lisbon
📝 They were introduced to the upcoming agenda at the unique Sana Metropolitano Hotel while enjoying a delicious breakfast based on local products
🛞 The attendees got to test first-hand the Mitsubishi Outlander PHEV driving to L’AND Vineyards, a luxurious and rural venue where the official press presentation of the New Outlander PHEV was held with Key Expects who came directly from Japan.
💆🏼 The trip peaked with a relaxing break at the Altis Belem Spa Hotel. Later the event was culminated with our guests enjoyed an exclusive dinner at the innovative and artistic museum Maat Lisbon.

That person is the Product Launch & Sourcing Manager. They connect market demand, global manufacturing, and execution — and bring products to life on Amazon. 🚀

What do they actually do?
🔹 Lead new product launches end-to-end — from idea to first sales
🔹 Research trends, markets, and competitors to identify winning opportunities
🔹 Source and negotiate with international suppliers to achieve the best price–quality–timing balance
🔹 Manage samples, testing, and quality control before launch
🔹 Coordinate inventory planning and ensure smooth stock flow
🔹 Work closely with Amazon & Shopify teams to support go-to-market execution

💡 In short: they’re the bridge between product ideas and profitable launches on Amazon.

What makes a great Product Launch & Sourcing Manager?
✅ 3+ years of experience in sourcing, product development, or product launches
✅ Strong negotiation, analytical, and project management skills
✅ Confident English (B2+) for global supplier communication
✅ Advanced Excel / Google Workspace skills
✅ Strategic, proactive, and results-driven mindset
✅ Comfortable working in international eCommerce environments

Compensation & Growth:
💰 Competitive salary in USD
🌍 Flexible working hours (EU time zone)
🏖 24 paid vacation days + sick leave
🚀 Career growth in a fast-growing eCommerce company

text:
Here’s a step-by-step guide to help you plan a successful social media product launch 👇🏼

✅Set Clear Goals and Objectives:
Define what you want to achieve with your product launch.

✅Create a Launch Timeline:
The launch date and any pre-launch or post-launch activities.

✅Choose the Right Social Media Platforms:
Identify which social media platforms your target audience frequents.

✅Decide a campaign look and a message:
All campaign communication should look consistent. Colours, message, fonts, music, theme etc.

✅Leverage Influencers:
Collaborate with relevant influencers in your industry or niche to promote your product (only if required)

✅Develop Content:
Craft engaging content that highlights your product’s features and benefits.

✅Create a Content Calendar:
Plan and schedule your social media posts and content in advance. Ensure consistency in messaging and branding across all platforms.

The above is just tip of the iceberg of course! There is much more that goes into launching your dream project/product and we are here to help take that load off you!

text:
Costly Compliance Mistake During Product Launch 🚨

I recently had a meeting with a client who launched a baby product on Amazon US. He sourced the product from China, and like many new sellers, he trusted his supplier to guide him through compliance.

The supplier claimed to know the certifications required for selling in the U.S. and even arranged a CPC certificate — for an additional fee. Everything seemed fine… until the shipment reached Amazon.

❌ Amazon rejected the certificate.
❌ The lab used was not authorized.
❌ The certifications were not sufficient for U.S. compliance.

Now, the entire shipment is sitting in the U.S., unfulfillable. The client is stuck with blocked inventory and thousands of dollars tied up. We’re helping him fix the issue by coordinating additional testing in the U.S., but this delay could’ve been avoided.

🔍 Key Lesson:
Don’t rely solely on your supplier when it comes to compliance.
✅ Check Amazon's AND U.S. government regulations
✅ Verify which certifications are required
✅ Use only CPSC-accepted labs for CPC and children’s products
✅ Cross-check before shipping!

🛑 A small oversight can become a big financial and operational setback.

If you're planning a new product launch or facing a similar issue, feel free to reach out. I've spent years navigating these challenges and can help you avoid expensive mistakes.

text:
🏹 Crafting a Compelling Press Release for Your Product Launch 🎯

A compelling press release can be the key to unlocking media coverage and generating buzz for your product launch. It’s not just about announcing your product — it’s about creating a narrative that captures interest and drives engagement.

Discover how to craft a press release that truly resonates with your audience:
🌟 Start with a Strong Headline: Your headline should be concise, attention-grabbing, and clearly convey the key message of your product launch. This is your first impression — make it count!
✍️ Lead with the Essentials: The opening paragraph should answer the who, what, when, where, and why of your product launch. Get straight to the point with the most important details to hook your audience from the start.
💡 Highlight Key Features and Benefits: Explain what makes your product unique and why it matters to your target audience. Focus on the benefits that will resonate most with your readers.
🗣️ Include a Compelling Quote: A well-placed quote from a company leader or product manager adds credibility and provides a human touch. It’s also a great way to emphasise your brand’s enthusiasm and confidence in the product.
📊 Add Supporting Details: Provide additional context such as market research, customer testimonials, or any exclusive offers that coincide with the launch. This helps to reinforce the importance and value of your product.
➡️ Close with a Clear Call to Action (CTA): End your press release with a CTA, directing readers to your website, product page, or a pre-order link. Make it easy for them to take the next step.
📞 Include Media Contact Information: Ensure that media representatives know how to reach you for further enquiries. Include the name, phone number, and email of your media contact.

An effective press release can be the difference between a product that generates buzz and one that gets lost in the noise. 🎯 Need help crafting the perfect press release? Twin Archer can help you create a press release that captures attention and drives results. Visit us at www.twinarcher.co!

text:
Most people think building a product is the hard part… 👀
But what I learned this week changed my perspective completely.
👉 Building is just the beginning.
After launching a product, the real work starts:
🚀 Product Launch
It’s not just “release and relax” — it’s about how users receive it.
📊 Product Metrics
You have to measure everything:
• Are people using it?
• Are they coming back?
• Is it solving the problem?
📈 Growth Phase
This is where you improve, scale, and make the product better over time.
I’m starting to understand that Product Management is not just about building…
👉 It’s about continuously learning from users and improving the product.
This journey is really opening my mind, and I’m learning something valuable every week 🚀
Let’s talk 👇
What do you think is harder — building a product or growing it?
#ProductManagement
#ProductLaunch
#ProductMetrics
#GrowthMindset
#BuildInPublic
TechLearningJourney @betechified

text:
The $100K decision that nearly killed our product launch actually saved us millions. Here's the brutal lesson about enterprise infrastructure.

Picture this: 6 months into development, 2 weeks before launch, our biggest enterprise prospect drops a bombshell.

"Your current infrastructure won't handle our compliance requirements."

We had two choices:
→ Launch anyway and hope for the best
→ Delay launch and rebuild everything properly

The rebuild cost us $100K and 3 months.

Our investors were furious. Our team was exhausted. I questioned everything.

But here's what happened next:

That same enterprise client became our anchor customer at $2.5M ARR.

Then came three more enterprise deals in 6 months.

Why? Because we had what 99% of our competitors didn't - bulletproof enterprise-grade infrastructure from day one.

The lesson hit me hard:

Sometimes the most expensive decision upfront becomes your biggest competitive advantage.

That $100K investment generated $8.7M in enterprise revenue over 18 months.

While competitors scrambled to retrofit their products for enterprise clients, we were already there.

The courage to make hard decisions when stakes are highest separates successful products from failed ones.

Enterprise clients don't want promises. They want proof your infrastructure can handle their scale, security, and compliance needs.

Ready to turn your expertise into enterprise-ready content that drives real revenue? 

DM me "ENTERPRISE" and I'll show you how our platform helped 47 B2B companies create content that closes enterprise deals.

Elevating Your Experience: Launching a New Product with Back-to-Back Operations and Local Expertise
 
In today’s fast-paced world, launching a new product requires more than just a great idea – it demands precision, innovation, and a deep understanding of your target market. @your.boutiqueagency is your partner in Portugal to leverage back-to-back operations and local expertise to create unforgettable experiences in handpicked locations in our beautiful country.  Here’s how our partnership will take your product launch to new heights:

text:
Ever been hyped for a product launch only to discover the launch date got pushed to "someday soon"? Tesla's latest delay on their low-cost EV (think a no-frills Model Y) reminds me that even in tech, sometimes the best things in life have to wait a little longer. 🚗⏳

According to Reuters, what was set to drop in H1 this year might now be coming our way in late 2025 or early 2026. Yes, delays can be as frustrating as a slow internet day, but they also show a serious commitment to quality. It’s like waiting for your favorite brew to steep just right—even if it tests your patience, the end result is worth it. ☕💡

This situation highlights the fine line between the rush to market and the need to perfect innovation. In our fast-paced tech scene, sometimes pausing for precision is the ultimate power move. So, here’s a thought: perhaps a strategic pause isn’t a setback, but a setup for groundbreaking progress.

What do you think? Is this delay fueling future breakthroughs or just testing our patience? Let’s chat about the balance between speed and quality in the tech world! 🚀✨

text:
Imagine you had $100 to build a communications team for a product launch. 
.
.
How would you spend it?
.
.
Most people might think the bulk should go to advertising—but let’s break it down differently:

Two approaches: One blows it all on a flashy ad campaign. The other builds a strong foundation with a balanced spend across essential areas. Who do you think sees better results?

Here's how I’d allocate the budget:

➡ $30 on Social Media Engagement: Boost key posts and stories to build anticipation and create organic conversations before the launch.

➡$25 on Content Creation: Invest in a designer or writer to develop quality visuals and copy that make the product irresistible.

➡$20 on Email Outreach: Use targeted, personalised emails to reach potential customers with launch teasers and exclusive offers.

➡$15 on Influencer Collaboration: Partner with micro-influencers who genuinely align with the product and can create buzz in their circles.

➡$10 on Feedback: Run quick surveys or focus groups to fine-tune the messaging, ensuring it hits home with your audience.
.
.
The real lesson? It’s not about how much you spend, but how strategically you invest in the right channels to build momentum and trust.
.
.
How would you allocate $100 for your next product launch?

#CommsStrategy #BudgetingForSuccess #MarketingOnABudget #ProductLaunch #StrategicCommunications

text:
What's the sales team's real job after a product launch?

It's not just about pitching the new feature. It's about becoming the feedback loop between customers and product.

Sales needs to funnel back what they're hearing—what's resonating, what's missing, what's blocking deals. No product launches perfect, and the gap between what shipped and what closes deals only gets filled when sales communicates those insights back to product.

The question isn't whether your sales team can sell the launch. It's whether they can help you iterate it into something that actually wins deals.

text:
3 Tips for Product Launch
Create a Strong Pre-Launch Buzz: Build excitement and anticipation before your product hits the market. Use social media, email campaigns, sneak peeks, and influencer collaborations to generate interest. Consider offering exclusive pre-orders, behind-the-scenes content, or early access to loyal customers. The goal is to get your target audience talking and eager to try your product when it's available.
Leverage Customer Feedback for Refinement: Before launching to the masses, test your product with a small group of users (beta testers). Collect their feedback to make any final improvements or adjustments. This approach not only ensures the product is polished but also builds a sense of trust and engagement with your customers. They will appreciate being part of the process and feel more invested in the success of the product.
Ensure a Seamless Launch Experience: Make sure the product launch experience is smooth for your customers. This includes ensuring your website can handle increased traffic, offering multiple payment options, and providing detailed product information. A smooth customer experience on launch day—whether through easy navigation, fast shipping, or responsive customer support—will significantly impact how your audience perceives your brand and product

Launching a product soon? 
Before you hit the market, ensure these three crucial aspects are in place for optimal results.

📌Know your audience: Who are you selling to? What are their needs and wants? Understanding your ideal customer is crucial for success. 

📌Check the competition: What else is out there? Analyze your competitors' strengths & weaknesses to position your product for maximum impact. 

📌Does it solve a problem?  Does your product offer a unique value proposition? If it doesn't fill a clear need, it might struggle to gain traction.

text:
Ready to Launch Your Next Big Thing?

Launching a new product is like throwing a party, and you want everyone to come, enjoy, and remember it! It's all about making noise in the right way and at the right time. Here are surefire strategies to ensure your product launch is the talk of the town:

1. Tease Your Audience: Build hype! Start dropping hints and sneak peeks of your product. Make your audience curious and excited.

2. Use Storytelling: Connect your product with a story that touches the heart of your consumers. Show them why they can't live without it.

3. Influencer Partnerships: Team up with influencers who resonate with your brand. Their endorsements can propel your product into the spotlight.

4. Optimize for Conversion: From catchy landing pages to irresistible offers, make sure that once your audience is interested, they are guided smoothly towards making a purchase.

5. Monitor and Adapt: Keep an eye on the analytics. What's working? What's not? Be ready to tweak your tactics on the go.

Ready to get your product launch off the ground with a bang? Connect with us at Purple Cow Services, your go-to eCommerce and digital marketing agency. We make sure your product launch is flawless from start to finish!

text:
**Myth vs Reality — Product Launch**

Launching a product is often seen as the final step, but in reality, it’s only the starting point. A product doesn’t succeed just because it exists in the market—it succeeds when people understand it, trust it, and repeatedly see it in the right places. Without clear positioning, a strong message, and a plan to stay visible, even the best products can go unnoticed.

True product success is built through consistency and strategy. When your launch is supported by storytelling, credibility, and ongoing communication, your brand earns attention and loyalty over time. Because launches create awareness—but clarity, trust, and visibility create lasting growth.

text:
Why Your Product Launch Could Fail Without Strategic Communications
.
.
Product launches aren’t just about the product—they’re about how you communicate its value to your audience. 

Two startups: One focuses solely on building the product, while the other crafts a strategic communication plan to build buzz and anticipation.

Which one do you think succeeds?

Your communication strategy is what turns a product into a must-have.

But how do you build that strategy? 

👉Know Your Audience: Understand who they are and the problem your product solves.

👉Craft Your Message: Highlight your product’s core value in a way that resonates emotionally and logically.

👉Choose the Right Channels: Use the platforms where your audience is most active.

👉Build Anticipation: Create buzz with teasers, influencer endorsements, and a soft launch.

👉Engage & Maintain: Post-launch, engage with feedback and keep the momentum going.

It’s not enough to launch a great product—people need to hear about it the right way.
.
.
Do you have a communication plan for your next product launch?
.
.
#ProductLaunch #StrategicPR #BuzzBuilding #LaunchSuccess

text:
Why Planning for the 30 Days Before and After Launch is Important?

Planning for the 30 days before and after the product launch is crucial for several reasons:

1️⃣Maximizing Success: By carefully planning and executing activities before the launch, product managers can ensure that the product is well-prepared for market entry, increasing the likelihood of a successful launch.

2️⃣Setting the Tone: The period immediately following the launch is critical for shaping the product’s trajectory and reputation in the market. Effective planning ensures that the product is positioned for success and receives a positive reception from customers and stakeholders.

3️⃣Addressing Challenges Proactively: Planning for potential challenges and contingencies post-launch allows product managers to respond quickly and effectively to issues as they arise, minimizing disruptions and maintaining momentum.

4️⃣ Optimizing Performance: Monitoring performance metrics and gathering user feedback post-launch provides valuable insights that can be used to iterate on the product and improve its performance over time. Planning for these activities ensures that product managers are proactive in driving continuous improvement.

Follow us for more Product Management Strategies 

@product.coaching

text:
We delayed our product launch by 6 months and spent $100K we didn't have. It was the best decision we ever made.

Here's the story most founders won't tell you.

We had an enterprise client ready to sign. Big logo. Big revenue. But when we dug into what they actually needed, we hit a wall.

Our infrastructure wasn't built for it.

We had two choices:

1. Ship what we had, patch it together, and hope it held.
2. Delay. Rebuild. Do it right.

We chose option 2. It cost us $100K in engineering hours, delayed our launch by six months, and had our board questioning every decision we made.

But here's what happened next.

That rebuilt infrastructure became our biggest selling point. Enterprise clients stopped asking "can you handle our scale?" because the answer was obvious. We closed 3 more enterprise deals in the following quarter - each worth more than the one that nearly broke us.

The $100K investment returned millions.

The lesson wasn't about infrastructure. It was about the courage to delay when everyone is pushing you to ship.

Most product failures aren't technical. They're decisions made under pressure, when the right answer required patience nobody wanted to give.

If your content strategy is stuck in the same trap - rushing to publish, patching things together, hoping it holds - that's exactly the problem we built our platform to solve.

We help tech leaders and their teams turn expertise into consistent, enterprise-grade content without the bottleneck, the agency bills, or the authenticity problem.

Ready to stop patching and start building something that scales?

Drop a comment below or send me a DM and I'll show you exactly how we do it.

[ Wednesday, October 2nd 2024]

Indolok Press Conference & Product Launch 
We are excited to announce that Indolok has successfully held a press conference and product launch for our latest innovative fire protection solutions!

Lith-PRO : A fire extinguisher has designed specifically to combat fires involving Lithium-ion batteries. As the use of Lithium-ion batteries continues to rise in various industries, we understand the increasing demand for specialized fire protection. Lith-PRO is our solution to this critical challenge.

GRENOZ : An eco-friendly fire extinguisher with an atmospheric lifetime of only 5 days, minimizing its environmental impact while providing maximum fire suppression efficiency. GRENOZ is another step towards our commitment to sustainability and environmental protection.

Fire Tape : An automatic fire protection solution designed to protect electrical panels and equipment, ensuring your valuable infrastructure remains protected from unexpected fire hazards.

Rahmat Rezki President Director of PT. Indolok Bakti Utama said: 
“These innovations highlight not only our commitment to providing the best solutions for our customers but also to protecting the environment and public safety. With the increasing number of devices using Lithium-ion batteries, the need for specific fire extinguishers is becoming more urgent, and we are here to address that challenge.” 

We are proud to lead the way in fire, safety, security, and rescue innovation, keeping both our communities and the environment safe.

text:
With our product launch happening ✨TOMORROW✨ we wanted to introduce you to the mama behind our brand! 

Hi friends, I’m Aubrey! 👋🏻 

I’m a mama to these two little ones and a pediatric nurse. For the past six months I’ve been working away on this small business during nap times and late into the night, so it has truly been a labor of love! 

Becoming a mama a few years ago was a challenging transition for me, especially the first few months. NOTHING came as easy as I thought it would be…breastfeeding, postpartum recovery, balancing life as a working mom, it was all so hard! What got me through was the love and encouragement from my sweet family and friends, and most importantly, giving myself and my babies grace each day. 

That’s why I started Cradle & Grace! I want new mamas to know you are not alone in the challenging moments of motherhood! You are strong and you were made for this role, in fact, it will be the MOST important work you do in this life! My nursing background and love for wholesome, natural living inspired our “safe, all-natural” fourth trimester shop. I hope our products help you cherish these early days, comfort you in the hard moments, and always remind you to give yourself grace. 🫶🏻 

Thank you so much for your support, I’m so grateful for each of you! 

🩷 Aubrey

text:
Product launch.

For most companies, new service and product launches are always a key objective - because of the potential to attract and retain customers.

With an effectively planned strategy, you can make sure you've got your product in front of the right people, at the right time, in the right way. Many businesses assume if they build a great product or service, people will flock to it. That’s rarely the case.

We've worked closely with our loudspeaker client Spendor, over the last six years. Mainly assisting with the Brand Strategy but always in alignment with their Product Development team. It is vital that any new product actually meets their market needs and not just because of market pressures - and delivers the experience their brand has become known for.

The best product launches must also consider the most lucrative audience. For example, it can be far more cost-effective to launch only in one territory and become a market leader, than to spread yourself too thinly and become swamped by the competition.

text:
Coming soon to Dirt Hero Distribution 🤘🏻

Product Launch: @oakcomponents HT4 Brake Lever for Hope Tech 4 brakes

The OAK HT4 takes an already outstanding brake to the next level:

The Hope Tech 4 is known for its great build quality, spare parts availability, and reliability—but it has one weak point: the rider interface, a.k.a. the brake lever blade. The design, more aligned with moto-style or two-finger braking, didn’t convince us and led us to develop a tuning brake lever for this exceptional brake.

In true OAK fashion, our design delivers an exceptionally strong, stiff, and ergonomic lever.

Better Ergonomics & Grip Face Technology:

Thanks to the ergonomically optimized finger contact surface combined with OAK’s proven Grip Face Technology (GFT), your finger sits securely at the end of the lever at all times. No sharp edges, no distractions—just full control, even in wet conditions. The upgrade to finally unlock the full potential of the Hope Tech 4. You’re going to love it.

Optimized Adjustability – Full Compatibility:

We’ve refined the adjustment range of the braking system in a meaningful way while maintaining full compatibility with widely available spare parts. An upgrade without limitations.

Enhanced Modulation & Braking Power:

With an optimized lever motion and increased mechanical leverage, you get more braking power and finer modulation with the same finger force. Perfect for technical trails and demanding conditions.

As Individual as You Are:

At OAK, every brake lever is developed individually for its brake system. Years of experience in ergonomics and brake tuning have led to a systematic approach to identifying improvements. That’s why each lever is individually tailored to its system. The distinctive OAK three-pocket design provides the backbone for a lever that is strong, precise, and visually striking.

text:
Product Launch: @intend_bc Trinity 2.0 🔥

Updates:

Longer front hose:

To proactively provide the ideal front hose length, we have so far shipped the front brake pre-filled with 85 cm of hose—suitable for 96.76% of customers. Those needing a longer hose could request it free of charge at the time of purchase. However, of the 3.24% of customers who require a longer hose, very few actually make this request, leading to occasional frustration.

To make sure all customers receive the ideal hose length, we now ship a standard 100 cm hose — unfilled to allow for each customer to have their individual desired cable length.

Titanium Bolts: A Premium Upgrade at No Extra Cost

More is more: The refrigerators on the caliper are getting bigger. More cooling means better performance, and the caliper with the refrigerator now has a slightly more robust appearance.

Painless Fitting: Added Security in Extreme Cases

Introducing the new Painless Sleeve. While the standard fitting has proven reliable in normal use, a few extreme crash scenarios—where the front wheel folded and rotated 360°—led to the hose being pulled from the fitting.

To improve crash resistance, all Trinity EN & DH brakes will now come with the new Painless Fitting and Painless Sleeve. The sleeve is removable for installation and maintenance, while the core concept of the Painless Fitting remains fully intact.

Upgrades:

For those who want to upgrade their Trinity brakes, all individual parts are available separately.

Titanium bolt kits, refrigerators, and Painless Sleeves can all be purchased as upgrade kits. Each kit includes the necessary parts for both the front and rear brake.

The first official batch of the Trinity 2.0 will be exclusively silver. This silver color variant is not a limited edition but will now be a permanent part of the lineup. 

* * * 
Note from TEBP: No, I'm not going to tell you when the next batch becomes available because I finally want to get a set for myself! 😂
* * *

text:
"This app is going to be everywhere," he said, his voice brimming with confidence. 

I was on a discovery call with a prospect, discussing his product. 

He was looking for Social Media Marketing Services for his product launch.

As he delved into the features and benefits, his confidence was palpable. "This app is something that’s going to be everywhere," he said, "There's nothing like it on the market. That's why I don't see the point in spending much money on marketing. The product will sell itself."

My heart sank a little after hearing that.

The truth is that many people still don’t realize the importance of marketing. 

They think online or offline marketers are just out to eat into their profits. But the opposite is true.

The world is a noisy place. 

Countless products are vying for attention. Without a focused marketing strategy, your product might get lost in the noise, even if it's the best thing since sliced bread.

Therefore, you need a solid marketing strategy to get the word out there. 

Investing in strong marketing ensures your product reaches its full potential and makes a real impact in the market.
 
How?

By Strategically positioning your brand and targeting focused content, you will

✅Reach the right customers
✅Educate them about the product's benefits, and 
✅Build credibility.

Social media marketing does just that—putting your business in front of your ideal customers and making the best first impression possible. 

It nurtures their interests and builds confidence in your product.

It allows them to see the people working behind the products they're interested along with social proof.

So, are you a business interested in reaching your target audience and converting sales?

Comment "SMM" and I'll get in touch ASAP.

text:
Ancienne clinique Ker Lena,
un site remarquable et emblématique en front de mer à Rosckoff, face à l’île de Batz.

L’ensemble avec la villa à fait l’objet d’une réhabilitation portée par le groupe Réalités, avec la création de 40 superbes logements.

Le projet du hall s’inscrit dans cette transformation, en proposant une écriture intérieure sobre et contemporaine, en dialogue avec l’histoire du lieu et ses magnifiques vues sur mer.

Une atmosphère apaisante et élégante, inspirée de l’univers marin.
L’alliance du bois, de la pierre et du vert sauge crée un équilibre subtil entre modernité et authenticité.

Les suspensions de chez Designheure et Wever & Ducré, une moquette de chez EGE redessinée participent à la mise en scène lumineuse, tandis qu’une signalétique dorée, évoquant le corail, affirme l’identité du lieu.

Un espace pensé comme une véritable expérience d’entrée.

#architectureinterieure #renovation #patrimoine #promotions #designinterieur

Understand LLM reasoning by creating your own reasoning model - from scratch! @rasbt #LLMs #reasoning #python #pytorch

Sebastian Raschka, the bestselling author of "Build a Large Language Model (From Scratch)", is your guide on this exciting journey. Sebastian mentors you every step of the way with clear explanations, practical code, and a keen focus on what really matters.

You’ll start with a compact, pre-trained base model that runs on consumer hardware, then upgrade it step by step to tackle ever-more difficult problems and scenarios. You’ll measure its performance, add reasoning at inference time without training, and then improve it further with reinforcement learning. By the end of the book, you’ll have a small but capable reasoning stack built from the ground up!

text:
UGH!! Well, on my birthday, having to deal with some crap (level 46 today!). 

Only reason I keep my FB account is to keep in touch with some family and friends only on there. On there, I use my husband's last name, which is not my legal name, and I don't use anywhere else - O'Brien. My own last name is a very uncommon German one, didn't want to be found too easily, not that I had anything to hide but wanted to keep my circle small there. 

Anyways, my first name is Rebecca. And unfortunately, someone named Rebecca O'Brien doxed a federal agent and his family - and we happen to be the same general blonde type. The profile pic I use there shows me at a distance, too bad I didn't have the same one as here when this happened (luckily some are realizing I'm not the same person and telling the others so maybe it will back off, and I made a statement explaining that it is not me) since the face is clearly different. The one who actually did this apparently locked down or deactivated her account, so they're finding my account and thinking I'm her.
